metadata.title: Scope Creep Freelancer Guide | FlowDockr
metadata.description: How to handle revision overload and out-of-scope requests without damaging client trust.

hero.title: Stop scope creep before it becomes unpaid labor.
hero.description: Use revision limits, change rules, and confirmation language to keep projects profitable.

usage.label: Playbook
usage.title: 3-step scope control
usage.description: Create clear boundaries and get explicit client agreement.

items.title: Set revision rounds
items.description: Define exactly how many rounds are included.

items.title: Define change fee rule
items.description: State how out-of-scope requests are quoted and approved.

items.title: Request confirmation
items.description: Ask the client to confirm policy before continuing work.

cta.title: Generate your revision policy.
cta.description: Use copy-ready wording you can send today.
